content:
Our Story, Our Mission Built on tradition. Driven by passion. Committed to your growth.
How It All Began Sai Sports Unit Academy was founded in 2018 by Master Sai Teja
📸 Photo: Academy
Replace with static/images/dojang.jpg Our Philosophy 🥷 Discipline Every class begins and ends with respect. We hold our students to high standards — on the mat and in life.
🤝 Respect For instructors, training partners, opponents, and self. Respect is the foundation of all martial arts.
💪 Perseverance We do not quit. Whether it's a difficult technique or a tough tournament, we push through together.
🌟 Excellence We set a high bar for ourselves and celebrate every student's progress, no matter where they start.
Achievements & Credentials 🏆 Championship — Bronze Medal Our students represented the academy at the state and national level and brought home multiple medals in sparring and poomsae categories.
Come Train With Us Meet our team and see our facility. Your first class is completely free.
Book a Free Trial Meet the Instructors

Red/Black belt candidates only Panel of external examiners Families invited to attend 📋 Grading Requirements: Students must meet minimum class attendance, demonstrate all required techniques, and receive instructor approval. Speak with your instructor at least 4 weeks before grading day. What to Expect at Your First Class 1 Book Your Spot Call us, fill in the contact form, or just walk in during any class time. We'll confirm the best class for your age and level.
2 Arrive 10 Minutes Early Come in comfortable sportswear — tracksuit, shorts, t-shirt. No shoes needed on the mat. Bring a water bottle.
3 Meet Your Instructor Your instructor will introduce you to the class, explain the etiquette, and ensure you feel comfortable from the very first bow.
4 Train & Decide Join in, have fun, and take your time deciding. There is absolutely no pressure to enroll on the day.
Reserve Your Free Trial Class Pick any class above — your first session is completely free, with no commitment.

content:
Meet Our Instructors Certified. Experienced. Passionate about bringing out the best in every student.
Head Instructor 🥋
Master Sai Teja
Photo
static/images/instructor-master.jpg Master Sai Teja 🏅 Belt · 8+ Years Experience
With over 8 years of teaching experience, Master Sai Teja has guided students of all ages from their first white belt class to black belt and beyond. Known for a coaching style that is firm but encouraging, Master Sai Teja has produced many national and state medalists.
"Every student who walks through that door has the potential to be a champion — on the mat and in life. My job is to help them find it." Instructor Team Every class is led by a certified black belt instructor. No exceptions.

title: Our Instructors

content:
Programs for Every Age & Level World-class training tailored to where you are — and where you want to go.
Ages 4 – 7 🐯 Little Tigers Where champions begin.
Our Little Tigers program is specially designed for young children who are just discovering movement, coordination, and social skills. Through games, music, and beginner Taekwondo techniques, we make every class an adventure while quietly building focus, listening, and respect.
What They'll Learn: Basic kicks, stances, and blocks Following instructions and class etiquette Stranger danger and personal safety concepts Teamwork, turn-taking, and positive reinforcement Belt progression with age-appropriate grading Class Size: Max 12 students Duration: 45 minutes Uniform: Provided on enrollment Belt Range: White → High Yellow Book a Free Trial
Ages 8 – 14 ⚡ Junior Champions Build confidence. Compete. Excel.
Junior Champions is our flagship kids' program. Students follow the full Taekwondo curriculum — poomsae (forms), sparring, board breaking, and character development. Regular belt gradings provide clear milestones, and tournament participation is encouraged for those who want to compete.
What They'll Learn: Full WTF/WT poomsae curriculum through colored belts Olympic-style sparring with full protective gear Breaking techniques (board & rebreakable boards) Self-defense scenarios appropriate for their age Goal-setting, leadership, and mental toughness Class Size: Max 20 students Duration: 60 minutes Gear: Sparring gear required at red belt Belt Range: White → Red Belt Book a Free Trial
Ages 15+ 🔥 Teen & Adult Program No experience needed. Just the will to start.
Our adult program welcomes complete beginners and experienced martial artists alike. Classes balance technical skill development, fitness, and competition preparation. Adults especially appreciate the stress-relieving power of a focused workout that also sharpens the mind.
What You'll Get: Full Taekwondo curriculum from white belt to black belt High-intensity sparring and conditioning sessions Poomsae training for grading and competition Flexibility, core strength, and cardiovascular fitness A welcoming community of like-minded adults Class Size: Max 25 students Duration: 75 minutes Fitness Level: All welcome Belt Range: White → Black Belt Book a Free Trial
All Ages · Invitation 🏆 Black Belt Program The pinnacle of your martial arts journey.
Invitation-only for dedicated color-belt students demonstrating exceptional commitment. The Black Belt Program provides advanced poomsae, deeper sparring strategy, referee and leadership training, and preparation for national tournaments. This is where champions are refined.
Program Highlights: Advanced poomsae: Koryo, Keumgang, Taebaek and beyond National and international competition preparation Leadership and junior instructor opportunities Strength & conditioning tailored for competitive athletes Direct mentorship from Master [Instructor Name] Entry Requirement: Red/Black belt or instructor invite Duration: 90 minutes Schedule: Separate timetable Belt Range: 1st Dan and above Enquire Now
Ages 12+ 🛡️ Self-Defense Workshop Real skills for real situations.
This monthly workshop series focuses on practical self-defense drawn from Taekwondo, with emphasis on awareness, de-escalation, and effective techniques anyone can use. Great as a standalone course or as a supplement to regular training.
Topics Covered: Situational awareness and threat assessment Escapes from grabs, holds, and common attacks Verbal de-escalation strategies Safety for children: stranger awareness module Confidence-building drills with a partner Format: Monthly workshop (2 hours) Cost: Included in membership / $[X] drop-in See Upcoming Dates
All Ages 👤 Private Lessons Focused. Personalized. Fast results.
Work one-on-one with a certified instructor to fast-track your progress, iron out specific techniques, or prepare intensively for grading or competition. Private sessions are fully customized around your goals and schedule.
Duration: 30 or 60 minutes Location: Academy or online (technique review) Pricing: Contact us for rates Availability: Subject to instructor schedule Book a Private Lesson
Membership Plans Simple, transparent pricing. No hidden fees.
Starter $[X]/mo ✓ 2 classes per week ✓ Belt grading included ✓ Online progress tracking ✗ Tournament support ✗ Black Belt program access Get Started Most Popular Champion $[X]/mo ✓ Unlimited classes ✓ Belt grading included ✓ Online progress tracking ✓ Tournament support & prep ✗ Black Belt program access Get Started Family discounts available. Ask about sibling rates. First class is always free.
Not Sure Which Program? Book a free trial and we'll recommend the perfect fit for you or your child.
Book Free Trial View Class Schedule
summary:
Programs for Every Age & Level

World-class training tailored to where you are — and where you want to go.

Ages 4 – 7

🐯 Little Tigers

Where champions begin.

Our Little Tigers program is specially designed for young children who are just discovering movement, coordination, and social skills. Through games, music, and beginner Taekwondo techniques, we make every class an adventure while quietly building focus, listening, and respect.

What They'll Learn:

  • Basic kicks, stances, and blocks
  • Following instructions and class etiquette
  • Stranger danger and personal safety concepts
  • Teamwork, turn-taking, and positive reinforcement
  • Belt progression with age-appropriate grading
Class Size: Max 12 students
Duration: 45 minutes
Uniform: Provided on enrollment
Belt Range: White → High Yellow
